name: shadcn/ui
best_for: accessible primitives (Radix) styled with Tailwind; the de-facto base layer for a React design system
caveats: not a dependency - the code becomes yours to maintain. An official MCP exists for component search/examples; prefer it when connected.

name: Magic UI
best_for: marketing-page effects and animated blocks that pair with shadcn/ui and Tailwind
caveats: effect-heavy by design - each one must still clear the performance budget and prefers-reduced-motion

name: Aceternity UI
licence: VERIFY - mixed free/paid tiers; check the specific component before use
best_for: high-impact hero and scroll effects for marketing pages
caveats: the most likely of these to blow a CWV budget; measure LCP/INP after adding one, and confirm the licence tier of the exact component

name: React Bits
best_for: small animated React interactions and text effects
caveats: copy-paste means the code and its bugs become yours; restyle to project tokens so it does not look stock

name: React Icons
licence: MIT wrapper - EACH icon set carries its OWN licence (verify per set)
best_for: one import surface over many icon sets
caveats: tree-shake or you ship the whole set. Brand/logo icons often have trademark restrictions even when the set is open-source.

name: Google Fonts
licence: open licences (mostly OFL) - verify per family
caveats: self-host for privacy (an external font request leaks visitor IPs to a third party) and for LCP; already covered by data/font-pairings.csv
